samsung_credentials.title: Samsung Account
samsung_credentials.description: 2FA must be disabled. If 2FA is on, go back and use the refresh token option.

samsung_token.title: Samsung IoT refresh token
samsung_token.description: Log in at https://account.samsung.com, open browser dev tools, go to the Network tab, filter for 'samsungiotcloud.com', and copy the refresh_token from any token response. You only need to do this once.

pat.title: SmartThings Personal Access Token
pat.description: Create a token at https://account.smartthings.com/tokens — tokens expire after 24 hours.

reauth_confirm.title: Re-authenticate
reauth_confirm.description: Your token expired. Create a new one at https://account.smartthings.com/tokens

error.invalid_samsung_auth: Invalid Samsung Account email or password.
error.samsung_2fa: 2FA is enabled — go back and use the refresh token option.
error.samsung_auth_error: Samsung Account authentication failed. Check credentials and try again.
error.invalid_samsung_token: Invalid or expired refresh token. Capture a new one.

abort.already_configured: This Family Hub is already configured.
